title: DNA barcoding and morphological analysis for rapid identification of crop-infesting Sunn pests
author: Syromyatnikov, Mikhail Y.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Figure 9 - Restriction fragments of COI PCR products (restriction enzyme, species): 1 AhlI, E. maura or E. testudinaria 2 AhlI, E. integriceps 3 PsiI, E. maura or E. testudinaria 4 PsiI, E. integriceps 5 Bst2UI, E. maura or E. testudinaria 6 Bst2UI, E. integriceps; M, 100 bp DNA ladder.
